name: DSwiss Inc
business: The Company and its subsidiaries are primarily engaged in the supply of high-quality health and beauty products, including weight management beverages, anti-aging solutions, and immune system enhancers. We specialize in turnkey private label manufacturing for nutraceutical and skincare/personal care ODM/OEM products.
sellsTo: customers in Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, Hong Kong, Australia, Taiwan, Macau, China

exposures.sentence: Our diverse product portfolio includes functional foods, health supplements, skincare, personal care, and pet wellness products, designed to enhance well-being and lifestyle quality.
DSwiss have own brand Quantum Resonant Magnetic Analyzer which is DSwiss Quantum Resonant Magnetic Analyzer.

catalysts.sentence: Aiming for a 100% increase in social media engagement compared to last year by the end of 2026 through targeted campaigns, influencer collaborations, and interactive content strategies.

catalysts.event: Participation in at least one major international trade show
catalysts.sentence: Planning to participate in at least one major international trade shows (e.g., Vitafoods Asia) by the end of 2026 as part of our global expansion strategy, enhancing brand visibility and fostering strategic partnerships.
Our key objectives include expanding our workforce by 50% by the end of 2026 and hiring specialists in R&D biotechnology and digital marketing to support our growth initiatives.

catalysts.event: Establish internship partnerships with at least three top universities in Malaysia
catalysts.sentence: We also plan to establish internship partnerships with at least three top universities in Malaysia, such as Taylors University, Monash University, and other universities in Malaysia, by 2026 to foster talent development and industry collaboration.
